title: Kitchen Organiser Caddy with Dishcloth Stand – Durable and Reliable Sink Caddy – Adequate Capacity for Kitchen Cleaning Supplies – Simple Water Drainage System – Dishwasher Safe – for Every Household
features: Superior Quality: Made using high-quality SUS 304 stainless steel, the black cleaning caddy is durable enough to withstand the test of time. Our rust-resistant sink organiser has a classy outlook that makes a wonderful addition to your kitchen countertop.

Compact and Spacious: The large 22 x 13 x 24 cm kitchen sink organiser has adequate capacity to hold the cleaning kitchen accessories like soap sponge, washing up brush, etc. The sponge holder also has a hanging bar for dishcloth, kitchen towel, etc.

Balanced Design: The kitchen organiser has a non-slip base that helps in keeping it firmly in its place to avoid tipping over. The non-slip base of the sink tidy caddy also prevents it from leaving scratch marks on the countertop and other surfaces.

Practical Choice: The dripping tray under the kitchen sink caddy facilitates easy removal of excess water and keeps your cleaning supplies dry and clean. This caddy organiser with the hanging bar works as a drying stand as well as a sink organiser.

Easy To Clean: Our kitchen storage and organisation caddy are dishwasher safe, except for the dripping tray, so you can clean it easily anytime you want. The creative design of the kitchen sponge holder makes an ideal choice for every household.
description: Need something to organize your cleaning supplies and keep them tidy? Our large kitchen caddy with a stand can help you in various ways to keep your kitchen tidy up. Quality and Comfort: Made using high-quality SUS 304 stainless steel, this kitchen sink organiser has a rust-resistant and strong body. The robust design with a removable dripping water tray makes this kitchen sink organiser a perfect choice for every household. This durable product is going to be your long-term kitchen cleaning partner. The classy look of this cleaning supplies holder makes complements every interior, making it a suitable choice for everyone. Ergonomic Product: Our caddy organiser has just the right size that you need to keep your kitchen cleaning supplies in an organized manner. The kitchen supplies caddy has a simple draining system through which the excess water from the wet items drips down in the dripping tray and can be removed easily. With this easy drainage, the cleaning items remain dry, clean, and odor-free. The non-slip base of the sink organiser keeps it fixed in its place to prevent tipping over. The lightweight but sturdy stand can be easily moved around without scratching the surfaces. Versatile Caddy: This innovative but practical design of the kitchen organiser makes it a must-have for every household. The rust-resistant body of the cleaning caddy is ideal for places with humid environments like washrooms, kitchens, etc. Use the tidy caddy to keep all your kitchen cleaning accessories like the kitchen sponge, washing cloth, cleaning liquid, washing up brush, sink strainer, and whatever you want. The caddy organiser can also be used for drying food items like vegetables and fruits after washing in the sink. Click on the button and add the kitchen caddy to your cart today.
